novel_features.name: Powder Day Scorer
novel_features.description: Rate upcoming days 1-10 for powder quality by combining forecast snow totals, wind, temperature, and historical averages

novel_features.name: Multi-Resort Powder Ranker
novel_features.description: Rank all synced resorts by powder potential, combining expected snowfall, base depth, and terrain openness

novel_features.name: Storm Tracker
novel_features.description: Show storm progression — when snow starts, peaks, and ends — by correlating rolling hourly forecasts over time

novel_features.name: Favorites Dashboard
novel_features.description: One-command view of all favorited locations with current temp, 24h snow, 5-day total, and operating status

novel_features.name: Overnight Snowfall Check
novel_features.description: Check the semi-daily forecast for the overnight period at favorited resorts — the powder hunter's morning ritual

novel_features.name: Conditions Diff
novel_features.description: Compare current snow report against the last-synced version to see what changed: new snow, lifts opened or closed, status changes

novel_features.name: Daily Snow Digest
novel_features.description: Pull all Daily Snow posts for favorited regions, strip HTML to clean text, and show a summary digest

novel_features.name: Historical Snowfall Trends
novel_features.description: Show snowfall trends, season totals vs averages, and base depth progression from cached report snapshots
